tasks.title: core/reconcile.Reconciler band-aware close-out: confirmed-clear close, Done vs To Verify, resolution_type, per-incident best-outcome rollup

scenarios: An incident closes only after the alert condition is confirmed cleared
A band-AUTO recovered host transitions its ticket to Done
A session with no terminal result leaves the incident open
Outcomes are recorded as per-incident best-outcome rows

tasks.title: core/escalation.Queue requeue lane: schedule delayed re-check, re-escalate-or-defer via authenticated Temporal signal, stand down at the cap

scenarios: An unanswered poll schedules a delayed re-check in the escalation queue
A re-check with a still-active condition re-escalates and pages the approver graph
A re-check with a recovered condition defers closure to the autocloser
Reaching the unanswered-poll cap stands down to a human
